title: Educator reviewer roster (subjects x grade bands) sized for scale
context: OER are abundant and free but are not indexed against the curriculum standards that govern what teachers must teach, so teachers cannot find the free resource aligned to a given standard. This project builds an open crosswalk of educator-reviewed AlignmentRecords linking OER to standards by stable identifier (CASE GUID / ASN URI), not by reproducing copyrighted standards text. Two hard gates never skip: the dual licence/terms gate (gate-002) and educator review of every record, with a blind second-reviewer precision audit holding precision at >= 95%. Scaling reviewed records to M2 volumes needs enough credentialed educators across subjects and grade bands.
objective: Build the educator reviewer roster across subjects x grade bands, sized to sustain M2 review throughput.
acceptanceCriteria: Roster lists educator reviewers across in-scope subjects x grade bands with qualifications recorded, sized to sustain the M2 review throughput.
Each reviewer's subject/grade-band coverage is mapped; gaps flagged; second-reviewer/auditor capacity preserved.
Roster respects privacy (no unnecessary PII); recorded in the PLAN governance section.
Output licensed CC-BY-4.0; the commit is DCO signed-off.
